message:
feat(refinery): add configurable quality gates before merge

Add a gates system to the merge queue that runs named quality gate
commands (test, lint, build, etc.) before merging polecat work to main.
Gates support parallel execution and per-gate timeouts, with any single
failure blocking the merge. When gates are configured, they replace the
legacy RunTests/TestCommand path while maintaining backward compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
